variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16293 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16293 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16293 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 195.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 180.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 160.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 330.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 316.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 305.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 1200 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16293
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 1200 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16293
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 121.0 mm, Dimension B: 105.0 mm, Dimension C: 17.0 mm, Dimension D: 112.0 mm, Dimension H: 381.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P137293 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16293
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P137293 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16293
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P137293 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
